items.title: Jaxson Hayes has officially obtained his Slovenian passport, although he won't be suiting up for the national team just yet.
items.author: LakersNation.com
items.body_excerpt:
Jaxson Hayes has officially obtained his Slovenian passport, although he won't be suiting up for the national team just yet.
lakersnation.com/jaxson-hayes...

media.title: Jaxson Hayes Obtains Slovenian Passport But Won't Play For National Team This Summer
media.description: Los Angeles Lakers center Jaxson Hayes has officially obtained a Slovenian passport, but he won't play for the national team this summer.
